mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.menuDirYn, m.programId, m.sortOrder, m.useYn, CAST(m.menuId AS CHAR(1000)) AS treePath, CAST(m.menuName AS CHAR(1000)) AS treeName, 0 AS depth FROM menu_info m WHERE m.parentMenuId IS NULL AND m.useYn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.menuDirYn, m.programId, m.sortOrder, m.useYn, CONCAT(mt.treePath, ' > ', m.menuId) AS treePath, CONCAT(mt.treeName, ' > ', m.menuName) AS treeName, mt.depth + 1 AS depth FROM menu_info m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.parentMenuId = mt.menuId WHERE m.useYn = 'Y' ) SELECT mt.depth, CONCAT(REPEAT(' ', mt.depth), mt.menuName) AS menuNameTree, mt.menuId, mt.menuName, mt.parentMenuId, mt.menuLevel, mt.menuIcon, mt.menuDirYn, mt.programId, mt.sortOrder, mt.useYn, mt.treePath, p.programName, p.programUrl FROM menu_tree mt LEFT JOIN program_info p ON mt.programId = p.programId AND p.useYn = 'Y'
AND mt.menuId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{menuId}, '%')
AND mt.menuName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{menuName}, '%')
ORDER BY mt.treePath, mt.sortOrder, p.sortOrder
SELECT menuId, parentMenuId, menuName, menuLevel, menuIcon, menuDirYn, programId, sortOrder FROM menu_info WHERE useYn = 'Y' ORDER BY menuLevel ASC, sortOrder ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_info WHERE menuId = #{menuId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_info WHERE parentMenuId = #{menuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE menu_info SET menuName = #{menuName}, menuDirYn = #{menuDirYn}, programId = #{programId}, useYn = #{useYn}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE menuId = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_info (menuId, parentMenuId, menuName, menuLevel, menuIcon, menuDirYn, programId, sortOrder, useYn) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{parentMenuId}, #{menuName}, #{menuLevel}, #{menuIcon}, #{menuDirYn}, #{programId}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn})
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.menuDirYn, m.programId, m.sortOrder, m.useYn, CAST(m.menuId AS CHAR(1000)) AS treePath, CAST(m.menuName AS CHAR(1000)) AS treeName, 0 AS depth FROM menu_info m WHERE m.parentMenuId IS NULL AND m.useYn = 'Y' AND m.menuDirYn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.menuDirYn, m.programId, m.sortOrder, m.useYn, CONCAT(mt.treePath, ' > ', m.menuId) AS treePath, CONCAT(mt.treeName, ' > ', m.menuName) AS treeName, mt.depth + 1 AS depth FROM menu_info m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.parentMenuId = mt.menuId WHERE m.useYn = 'Y' AND m.menuDirYn = 'Y' AND mt.depth < 1 ) SELECT mt.depth, CONCAT(REPEAT(' ', mt.depth), mt.menuName) AS menuNameTree, mt.menuId, mt.parentMenuId, mt.menuLevel, mt.menuIcon, mt.menuDirYn, mt.programId, mt.sortOrder, mt.useYn, mt.treePath, NULL AS programName, NULL AS programUrl FROM menu_tree mt ORDER BY mt.treePath, mt.sortOrder
SELECT CONCAT('MENU', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(menuId, 5) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM menu_info WHERE menuId REGEXP '^MENU[0-9]+$'
